message:
feat(fsqlite-vdbe): implement VDBE program builder, label system, and coroutines

Build out the VDBE (Virtual Database Engine) crate with ~834 lines:

- Label system: forward-reference labels for jump instructions with
  resolution and back-patching of pending p2 fields
- Program builder: type-safe instruction emission API with register
  allocation, label management, and automatic Halt insertion
- Sort order and key info: SortOrder enum and KeyInfo struct for
  multi-column key comparison with per-column collation and direction
- Coroutine mechanism: Yield/Resume opcodes and CoroutineContext for
  implementing co-operative subquery evaluation (EXISTS, IN, scalar)
- Disassembler: human-readable program dump with opcode mnemonics,
  operand formatting, and P4 value display for debugging
- Cursor management: CursorHint enum and read-only cursor state for
  btree/vtab/sorter cursors with expected-row-count hints

The crate depends on fsqlite-types for Opcode/VdbeOp/P4 definitions
and fsqlite-error for Result types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
